name: rice bran
description: Rice bran serves as a bulking agent that contributes dietary fiber, natural oils, vitamins, and minerals to food products.
raw_text: Wholegrain: Steamed parboiled wholegrain rice (98%), Sunflower oil. | Labels: en:green-dot | Rice Bran Oil: Rice Bran Oil | Labels: en:no-gluten, en:no-cholesterol | SAFOLA ACTIVE - MULTI-SOURCE EDIBLE OIL: PHYSICALLY REFINED RICE BRAN OIL, REFINED SOYA BEAN OIL, ANTIOXIDANTS (INS 319, 330), VITAMINS, ANTI FOAMING AGENT (INS 900a). | Labels: en:vegetarian, en:green-dot-india
